calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-11-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bruce Feder, via ZOOM, counsel for Lillith Aquino, Objector.

At the outset, the court queries counsel as to whether he has heard from Petitioner, Mr. Aquino. Counsel reports that he has not had any communication with Mr. Aquino. The court then questions counsel regarding whether his client intends to file their own petition. Counsel reports that they intend to file a competing petition only if Mr. Aquino proceeds in a different direction. The court states that Mr. Aquino has been provided with numerous opportunities to address the court. There being no appearance by Petitioner Dorian Aquino, the Petition for Probate of Will and Letters Testamentary is taken off calendar in open court.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-13-2021 Continued To May-11-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-23-2021 Continued To Apr-13-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Feb-09-2021 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-09-2021 Continued To Mar-23-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances; Dorian Aquino appeared in person in Propria Persona.

Mr. Aquino stated that he has an amended petition and a death certificate, that the date of death is September 1, 2019 and that all of the things that were listed on the Examiner's notes have been corrected. Mr. Aquino also stated that he is looking to retain an Attorney, that he is in the process of going through the Bar Association, that he also has a DE 121 form and that he will be sending it in via mail. The Court suggested that Mr. Aquino file his documents today at the filing window and encourages him to get a Lawyer. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to March 23, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The order to appear is off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-22-2020 Continued To Feb-09-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance is made by any counsel, party, or interested person.

An Order to Appear shall issue to the Petitioner, Dorian Aquino to appear on February 9, 2021 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear at hearing on December 22, 2020 and why he has not responded to the Probate Examiner's Notes. If no appearance is made on February 9, 2021, the Court will take the Petition for Probate of Will and Letters Testamentary off calendar.

The matter is continued to February 9, 2021 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Ruiz; Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)
